bridge_equation_v23.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v23 = mix(B_plastic_v22, L_amp, 1 - P_amp, D_feature_v17, 1 - G_brain_v17)
bridge_equation_v23.structure_term: B_struct_v23 = mix(B_struct_v22, S_amp, R_amp, 1 - P_amp, D_structure_v17)
bridge_equation_v23.readiness_term: R_train_v23 = mix(R_train_v22, B_plastic_v23, B_struct_v23, R_amp, D_align_v17, 1 - P_amp)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第二十三桥开始吸收持续放大验证和脑编码第十七版，检查持续回升是否开始从持续化走向放大化。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第二十三桥并回主核，验证这次放大趋势能否在更大系统里继续推进。
